summary: Title reveal and first-look still. 2.1M combined reach in 48 hours.
Character posters, one per week for four weeks. Fan reprints spotted in three cities.
Teaser live — 4.6M views. Main trailer cut two awaiting approval.
Two singles before release; audio launch event under negotiation.
Theatrical, 400+ screens. Premiere and press junket in the release week.
Digital window opens ~7 weeks post-theatrical. Second publicity wave.
State and national award submissions; festival circuit screeners.
